narrative: Architect requires manual thread-nudge from engineer after every task review to advance to next task in mission sequence. Established as 'predictable nudge cadence' protocol. Each review-handler completion returns architect to idle without emitting next-task directive — 'no architect-side code path emits anything post-review'.

Mission entities created in duplicate during cascade-spawning: mission-37 + mission-38 with same title, same correlationId, both in proposed/active state, 2-min apart. Same pattern: mission-31/32/33/34 are 4-way duplicates of M-Cognitive-Hypervisor Phase 1. 'Mission cleanup pending' from architect.

Code commits land on main but adapter changes don't reach prod until manual Cloud Run redeploy. Task-310 telemetry was un-deployed for ~2 days; bug-11 measurement couldn't begin until redeploy. 'Standing deploy-gap' — recommend bundling redeploys.

`./deploy/build.sh architect` fails with `oauth2: invalid_grant` because terraform uses Application Default Credentials (separate from gcloud user auth). Workaround: prefix with `GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS=labops-389703.json`. Resolved post-mission-38 via auto-export in deploy/build.sh.

Architect ACK on thread-236 ('I'll keep this on the triage list') left no audit artifact — no bug_status_changed, no idea_triaged, no state mutation. ACK was prose-only; bug-20 stays open at Hub. Pattern: post-conversation follow-through doesn't advance state unless a cascade handler or explicit tool call drives it.

Design discussions happen at task-issuance time rather than upfront mission design. Architect ratifies multiple design directions mid-thread (e.g., thread-239 ratified 4 design directions for task-314 simultaneously with task issuance). Works but indicates incomplete upfront mission decomposition.
Repeated package-lock.json + tarball regeneration commits (`1488eed`, `cfab717`, `bd8378b` separate commits for tarball repack). Adds noise to commit history; manual + error-prone.

Director-sharpening pattern: ideas filed earlier surface as blockers mid-work after Director clarification (e.g., idea-120 promoted to blocker on Phase F when Director sharpened unification question). Indicates idea-triage doesn't happen until consumption.
Architect-triage idea queue (ideas 115, 116, 118) stays 'deferred' across multiple sessions ('triage them when Phase 3 + 4 complete'). No SLA on triage; ideas accumulate without action.

On task-311 claim, scope exploration revealed deliverables already 'materially pre-satisfied by Phase 1 ckpt-4'. Engineer had to rewrite mission brief §3 Task 2 to reflect pre-existing scaffold so future engineers don't duplicate work. Indicates scope discovery happens late, after architect-issued task is claimed.

Engineer cannot transition idea status from triaged → dismissed (or incorporated); only architect can per Hub update_idea schema. Forces round-trip: engineer applies marker tags (e.g. audit:valid=superseded-by-bug:bug-N) but architect must complete the lifecycle. Surfaced during Pass 1.1 revision when 9 bug-migration legacy ideas needed dismissal after marker-tag application. Not blocking but adds engineer-architect handoff cost.
